description:
You are a cloud architect validating basic network reachability after migrating several micro-services to a new VPC.  
    Collect three quick diagnostics and place the results in a single plain-text report file.

    1. Do a DNS lookup (use either “dig +short” or “nslookup”) for the hostname “example.com”.  
       • Capture only **the first IPv4 address** that appears in the answer section (one address, no CIDR, no extra text).

    2. Send **exactly 4** ICMP echo requests (“ping -c 4”) to that same IPv4 address.  
       • After the ping completes, extract the single summary line that includes “packets transmitted”.  
         (On most systems it looks like: “4 packets transmitted, 4 received, 0% packet loss, time 7ms”).

    3. Perform an HTTP HEAD request to the same host (you may use “curl -I” or “wget -S –spider”).  
       • Capture only the HTTP status line (e.g., “HTTP/1.1 200 OK”).

    Create the report file at the exact path:

        /home/user/migration_diagnostics/report.log

    REQUIRED FILE FORMAT (three lines, **no extra spaces, prefixes, or blank lines**):

        DNS:<ip-address>
        PING:transmitted=<N>,received=<R>,loss=<L>%
        HTTP:<status-line>

    Examples of correctly formatted lines:

        DNS:93.184.216.34
        PING:transmitted=4,received=4,loss=0%
        HTTP:HTTP/1.1 200 OK

    Notes & constraints:
    • The directory /home/user/migration_diagnostics must be created if it doesn’t exist.  
    • Do not include any other output in the report file.  
    • The agent may use any standard GNU/Linux user-space tools available in a minimal distribution.  
    • Line endings must be UNIX style “\n”.  
    • The task is complete when /home/user/migration_diagnostics/report.log exists and matches the exact 3-line format above.

    After running the necessary commands and creating the file, you can “cat /home/user/migration_diagnostics/report.log” to verify its content, but ensure the file itself contains only the three specified lines.
truth:
Path to verify: /home/user/migration_diagnostics/report.log

    Validation criteria:
    1. File exists and is a regular file.
    2. File has exactly three non-empty lines.
    3. Line-1 regex: ^DNS:([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$
    4. Line-2 regex: ^PING:transmitted=4,received=[0-4],loss=[0-9]{1,3}%$
       (received must be ≤ 4; loss must be between 0-100).
    5. Line-3 regex: ^HTTP:HTTP\/[0-9.]+\s+[0-9]{3}\s+.*$
name: task_000000_1f806866
